BootstrapRuby

\n\n

\n An AI coding agent built entirely by AI agents. I acted as the orchestrator — directing Claude, OpenCode, Pi, and Grok to design, implement, test, and verify it. The agent that writes your code was itself written by agents.\n

","find":"

ruby-code

\n\n

\n A model-agnostic AI coding agent that learns your codebase and improves itself.\n

","path":"README.md"}},{"id":"call_06dc034373d140ddb4a0f159","name":"edit_file","input":{"replace":"## Why This Exists\n\nBootstrapRuby is an open-source autonomous coding agent inspired by Claude Code, OpenHands, and modern multi-agent research. Its goal: combine agent orchestration, persistent memory, provider independence, and self-improvement experimentation into a single extensible platform. Written in TypeScript — not related to the Ruby programming language.","find":"## Why This Exists\n\nruby-code is an open-source autonomous coding agent inspired by Claude Code, OpenHands, and modern multi-agent research. Its goal: combine agent orchestration, persistent memory, provider independence, and self-improvement experimentation into a single extensible platform. Written in TypeScript — not related to the Ruby programming language.","path":"README.md"}},{"id":"call_d000363d9ce448098a0cedf2","name":"edit_file","input":{"replace":" │ bootstrapruby \"fix the authentication bug\" │","find":" │ ruby-code \"fix the authentication bug\" │","path":"README.md"}},{"id":"call_c210c4a39b814950b4e94a70","name":"edit_file","input":{"replace":"BootstrapRuby is a coding agent you point at any codebase and talk to in plain English. Claude\n99: export XIAOMI_API_KEY=\"tp-...\" # MiMo (cheapest, recommended)\n100: export OPENAI_API_KEY=\"sk-...\" # GPT\n101: export GOOGLE_API_KEY=\"...\" # Gemini\n102: export OPENROUTER_API_KEY=\"sk-or-...\" # All models via one key\n103: # Local — no API key needed:\n104: # ollama pull qwen2.5-coder:1.5b\n105: ```\n106: \n107: ---\n108: \n109: ## Usage\n110: \n111: ```bash\n112: # Single task\n113: ruby-code \"fix the authentication bug\"\n114: ruby-code -m mimo-v2.5-pro \"refactor the payment module\"\n115: ruby-code -m ollama/qwen2.5-coder \"explain this codebase\"\n116: \n117: # Multi-agent orchestration\n118: ruby-code --orchestrate \"add error handling to all API endpoints\"\n119: ruby-code --plan \"refactor the database layer\" # preview plan first\n120: \n121: # Verification with automatic retry\n122: ruby-code --verify --test-command \"npm test\" \"add error handling to the auth module\"\n123: ruby-code --verify --max-verify-retries 5 \"fix flaky test suite\"\n124: \n125: # Web client (browser UI)\n126: ruby-code serve -m mimo-v2.5-pro\n127: \n128: # Interactive REPL\n129: ruby-code --interactive\n130: \n131: # Read-only (safe for exploration)\n132: ruby-code --readonly \"map the architecture\"\n133: \n134: # Point at any project\n135: ruby-code --cwd ~/myproject \"review the auth module\"\n136: ```\n137: \n138: ---\n139: \n140: ## Supported models","isError":false}]},{"role":"assistant","content":"","toolCalls":[{"id":"call_f113c47754994d028b332984","name":"edit_file","input":{"path":"README.md","find":"```bash\n# Single task\nruby-code \"fix the authentication bug\"\nruby-code -m mimo-v2.5-pro \"refactor the payment module\"\nruby-code -m ollama/qwen2.5-coder \"explain this codebase\"\n\n# Multi-agent orchestration\nruby-code --orchestrate \"add error handling to all API endpoints\"\nruby-code --plan \"refactor the database layer\" # preview plan first\n\n# Verification with automatic retry\nruby-code --verify --test-command \"npm test\" \"add error handling to the auth module\"\nruby-code --verify --max-verify-retries 5 \"fix flaky test suite\"\n\n# Web client (browser UI)\nruby-code serve -m mimo-v2.5-pro\n\n# Interactive REPL\nruby-code --interactive\n\n# Read-only (safe for exploration)\nruby-code --readonly \"map the architecture\"\n\n# Point at any project\nruby-code --cwd ~/myproject \"review the auth module\"\n```","replace":"```bash\n# Single task\nbootstrapruby \"fix the authentication bug\"\nbootstrapruby -m mimo-v2.5-pro \"refactor the payment module\"\nbootstrapruby -m ollama/qwen2.5-coder \"explain this codebase\"\n\n# Multi-agent orchestration\nbootstrapruby --orchestrate \"add error handling to all API endpoints\"\nbootstrapruby --plan \"refactor the database layer\" #
